$comment: Immunities. The generic immuneTo atom looks the effect up in data/interactions.json, so it covers type-, ability-, and item-based sources uniformly. Atoms: immuneTo (effect + moveTag), ability.
name: Immunities

tests.title: An answer to Prankster (a Dark type)
tests.rationale: Dark types ignore Prankster-boosted status. interactions.json: prankster -> {type: dark}.

tests.title: At least 2 powder immunities
tests.rationale: Grass type, Overcoat, or Safety Goggles. The 'multiple immunities to powder' constraint.

tests.title: Someone ignores Intimidate
tests.rationale: Clear Body / Inner Focus / Own Tempo ... or a Clear Amulet. interactions.json: intimidate -> {ability:[...]} | {item:[clearamulet]}.

tests.title: An answer to Fissure / OHKO moves
tests.rationale: moveTag:'ohko' delegates to per-move type immunity (Flying/Levitate/Balloon vs Ground Fissure) plus Sturdy/Sash.

tests.title: At least one Intimidate of our own
